top_signals.title: US Natural Gas Futures Top $3 for First Time Since March
top_signals.summary: US natural gas futures ended higher as forecasts shifted to show hotter weather in the coming weeks, signaling increased demand for the power-plant fuel as homes and businesses crank up air-conditioners. Intraday and end-of-day settlement prices for the front-month contract reached more than $3 per million British thermal units for the first time since late March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
